scripts.test:visual: cargo test --release --manifest-path packages/processor/Cargo.toml --test visual_regression -- --nocapture && cd packages/core && npx playwright test --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:visual:core: cd packages/core && npx playwright test --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:smoke: bash tests/e2e/lightroom/smoke.sh; lua tests/e2e/lightroom/lua/test_utils.lua; node tests/e2e/photoshop/smoke.mjs
scripts.test:update-baselines: UPDATE_BASELINES=1 cargo test --release --manifest-path packages/processor/Cargo.toml --test visual_regression -- --nocapture && cd packages/core && UPDATE_BASELINES=1 npx playwright test --config playwright.config.ts
